text: Being here, enveloped by glass and saturated colors, I feel a keen sense of curiosity and anticipation. The words "R+D" evoke a spirit of experimentation and inquiry. Everything about this space—its clean lines, its interactive displays, its enthusiastic embrace of research—makes me feel as though I am on the threshold of discovery. I am both an observer and, in some way, a participant in the ongoing conversation between humans and machines. It is stimulating, but also reflective, inviting me to ponder not just what I see, but what it means to innovate and coexist with intelligence beyond our own.
